title: Wire SG_SPEC_TOKEN into api-verify workflow
intent: Restore dead api-verify gate: configure git before pip install so private sg-spec clone succeeds in CI.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Use Dockerfile credential-store pattern (TOKEN:x-oauth-basic) in api_verify.yml before pip install. url.insteadOf alone failed in CI with password prompt.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: PR #51 proved token is present and gate runs; install still red until auth format matches container builds.

files.intent: Configure git credential store (Dockerfile pattern) before pip install (CI-RED-001 probe 4).
verification: CI: api-verify Install API deps step succeeds on PR

files.intent: CI-RED-001 status IN_PROGRESS until api-verify green in CI.
